Uses of Class
org.moeaframework.analysis.collector.InstrumentedExtension

Packages that use InstrumentedExtension
Package
Description
org.moeaframework
Convenience classes for using the MOEA Framework.
org.moeaframework.analysis.collector
Collectors record information periodically during the execution of an algorithm.

  • Uses of InstrumentedExtension in org.moeaframework

    Methods in org.moeaframework with parameters of type InstrumentedExtension
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    Instrumenter.instrument(Algorithm algorithm, InstrumentedExtension extension, List<Collector> collectors, Set<Object> visited, Stack<Object> parents, Object object, Class<?> type)
    Recursively walks the object graph to 1) determine the nesting of objects to help determine which objects are to be instrumented; and 2) attach the Collectors to any matching objects.
